query:
SELECT
      type,
      token,
      name,
      address,
      pool_key,
      rate_trend_14d,
      fee_pct,
      yield_apr,
      yield_apy,
      borrow_apy,
      tvl,
      total_supplied,
      total_borrowed,
      fees_7d,
      volume_usd_7d,
      utilization_rate,
      protocol
    FROM dbt.api_execution_yields_opportunities_latest
